release.title: ATLAS Open Data for Research 2024 (DAOD_PHYSLITE, Run 2, 13 TeV)
release.description: Full Run 2 ATLAS Open Data release for research, produced with Athena Release 22 and MC campaign MC20a. Delivered in DAOD_PHYSLITE format — suitable for direct columnar analysis (uproot) and AnalysisBase workflows.

collections.title: ATLAS 2016 proton-proton collision data (DAOD_PHYSLITE, 13 TeV)
collections.description: 2016 proton-proton collision data at 13 TeV, 45,571 files, 35.4 TiB. Primary large-scale collision collection for manifest and subset planning.

collections.title: ATLAS 2015 proton-proton collision data (DAOD_PHYSLITE, 13 TeV)
collections.description: 2015 proton-proton collision data at 13 TeV, 10,049 files, 9.3 TiB.

collections.title: ATLAS MC top nominal samples (DAOD_PHYSLITE, MC20a, 13 TeV)
collections.description: Top nominal MC samples, 437 files, 855.3 GiB. Includes DSID 410470 (tt-bar, PhPy8EG A14) used in the official PHYSLITE tutorial notebook.

datasets.name: PhPy8EG_A14_ttbar_hdamp258p75_nonallhad
datasets.note: Event weight = cross_section * filter_efficiency * k_factor. Never use raw cross_section alone.
